title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A step-by-step tutorial on setting up Claude Code with Ollama to run large language models locally without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, LLM selection such as Qwen 3.5, and building a complete agentic AI travel application with multiple agents and a Flask-based UI.
